hero.eyebrow: Swapping unused outfits, because reducing textile waste is the real fit.
hero.titleEnd: with a New Style, Without Buying New.
hero.descriptionStart: Every swapped item is a real step against
hero.request: Audrey wants to swap your jacket

impact.landfillDescription: Three circular paths extend the life of every item in your wardrobe.
impact.swapDescription: From swiping to delivery at your door in 6 simple steps.

swap.title: Swap Clothes
swap.description: Reduce new purchases by extending clothing life through shared wardrobes.

donate.title: Donate Clothes
donate.description: Extra clothes reach communities in need instead of disposal sites.

recycle.title: Recycle Clothes
recycle.description: Damaged textiles are sorted and recycled instead of ending up in landfill.

search.title: Find a Favorite
search.description: Discover an item that matches your style and size.

offer.title: Make an Offer
offer.description: Choose one of your clothes as an exchange option.

wait.title: Wait for Confirmation
wait.description: The owner reviews your offer and approves the match.

approved.title: Owner Approves
approved.description: Both parties lock in the swap agreement.

payment.title: Confirm Payment
payment.description: Complete the service and shipping fees.

delivery.title: Clothes Delivered
delivery.description: The package reaches your door and CO₂ stays saved.

catalog.title: Outfit Collection
catalog.description: Swipe, match, and swap. Each card shows the estimated CO₂ saved by choosing circular fashion.

trend.title: Trend-Based Recommendations
trend.description: Looking for a unique outfit for a special event? Explore items available to swap below.

sustainability.title: Real, measurable, sustainable contributions
sustainability.description: Choose your path: donate or recycle
sustainability.emissionDetail: Equivalent to running a 1 PK AC for ~28 years.

carbon.title: How much carbon can you save?
carbon.description: Calculate emissions prevented by swapping clothes sitting unused in your wardrobe.
carbon.days: running a 1 PK AC for {{days}} days.

ecosystem.title: Build Indonesia's Circular Fashion Ecosystem
ecosystem.description: Brands, NGOs, communities, and style makers can move together. IJOL connects swapping, donating, and recycling in one measurable fashion ecosystem.
